reason: Verify global project invariants remain satisfied.
Check the implementation does not move compute semantics into the wrong layer.
Check core dialect neutrality and absence of RVV semantic branches in generic orchestration.
Check RVV plugin-owned EmitC body ownership and RVV-specific locality.
Check selected config and runtime-role data are consumed fail-closed.
Check EmitC route and descriptor-driven exporter quarantine.
Check focused evidence, lit/FileCheck, C++ tests, and remote evidence claims.
